text: The surgeon performs a laparoscopic radical prostatectomy, dissecting the bladder from the anterior abdominal wall and opening the bladder neck. The prostate gland and seminal vesicles are dissected and excised. The bladder is anastomosed to the distal urethra, and the excised prostate gland is placed into a retrieval pad and extracted through a small incision in the anterior abdominal wall.
